narrative:
Precinct West Liberty (precinct in Logan County) has 1,214 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
